tracks.trackId: Doubt Manifesto [July 7, 2026]::Doubt Manifesto 1.mp3
tracks.styleTags: slow-math philly-rap subs, post-rock big build, breaks into gentle-thrash-shimmer, austere intimate minimalist 437hz dorian ensemble minor folktronica shoegaze microtones, experimental bedroom syncopated raw intimate shoegaze,, powerful bassline, emotional climax
tracks.lyrics:
Zero expected effect. Base rate. Reject the text.
Ink spilled, zero built. Systems stiffen, lines drift.
Manifestos consolidate, give vocabulary.
Donella Meadows left a leverage point, a heavy hoist.
Milton Friedman's cold vision: crisis breeds the change.
Ideas lying around. Well-made weight. Ground laid.

Rubble built the banks. Bretton Woods. Red blood.
Seventy million dead, dread bred the welfare state.
Hegemonic victors, external competitors, cheap oil.
Montreal Protocol: ozone hole, whole fraud.
DuPont profited. Stranding pays, planning fails.
COVID shock, quick shots, zero durable shifts.
Two years, fund decay. Panic, then the old way.
Finance crashed, cash concentrated, wealth massed.

Transitions align with profit, state spite, tight markets.
German tariffs, Chinese factories, cost drops.
Moral surges recede. Greta’s streets went bleak.
Prices and war drove the green dream away.
Movements throw the sash; cash climbs the glass.
Energy, rents, insurance repricing: high speed engines.
Care economies, calendars, shared armies: dead weight.

tracks.trackId: Doubt Manifesto [July 7, 2026]::Doubt Manifesto 2_ Trauma.mp3
tracks.styleTags: slow-math philly-rap subs, post-rock big build, breaks into gentle-thrash-shimmer, austere intimate minimalist ensemble folktronica microtones, experimental bedroom syncopated raw intimate shoegaze,, powerful bassline, emotional climax, deep locked soul-trap-groove emptiness
tracks.lyrics:
False hope: trauma teaches. Raw truth: trauma torches.
Scars spawn strongmen, tall walls, raw shock.
Fear freezes sight. Shattered safety wrecks trust.

Dead loops lock. Reciprocal rage reigns.
Crushed crowds, drone-bound, rubble-ground.
Fortresses feed grief. Deep steel heals nothing.

Carceral cash climbs. Prison systems squeeze.
Militarized force exports war, imports dread.
Scared streets build blockades, shielding spaces.

Paranoid reflexes prevent repair.
Pre-collapse pages steer the slide, target the tilt.
Grim blueprints wait, bright bait bites.

tracks.trackId: Doubt Manifesto [July 7, 2026]::Doubt Manifesto 3_ Manifesto.mp3
tracks.styleTags: slow-math philly-rap subs, post-rock big build, breaks into shimmer, austere intimate minimalist ensemble folktronica microtones, experimental bedroom syncopated raw intimate shoegaze,, powerful bassline, emotional climax, deep locked soul-trap-groove emptiness
tracks.lyrics:
Manifestos manipulate, select facts, fake metrics.
Grab the figurine three point five percent figure.
Three hundred twenty-three campaigns targeted states.
Governments surrender, single structures crack, focal points snap.
Planetary capture disperses, million-fractured contracts, pension funds.

Passive models fail. Active power adapts, lobbies, absorbs.
"Resilience", "regenerative"—manifesto vocabulary becomes marketing copy.
Slow pages cannot steer fast storms.
Curricula, constitutions, generational turnover stalls.
AI two-year clock ticks. Climate tipping points pass.

Adaptation apartheid wins. Wealth-insulated enclaves rise.
Private firefighting, climate-proofed real estate, easy reading.
Insulation betrays, comfort stays, blind praise.

Aggression is older than civilization.
Aggression is older than civilization.

Flood defense-pounce, pandemic logistics-grounce,

Warrior archetype un-abolished—metabolized, polished.
Mature force protects life-condition seed,
Redirects aggression into guardian deed.

Fierce eye, sharp hand, shielding the land.
No empire-boots, just guarding the roots.
Hold the perimeter tight in the storm-swept night,
Protecting the breath, deflecting the death,
Until the strength of the arm matches pulse of the calm.

Aggression is older than civilization.
Aggression is older than civilization.
Aggression is older than civilization.

tracks.lyrics:
Burn-max, fire-track.
Civilizations stack power till the infrastructure cracks.
Muscle to coal, gas to oil, solar grid glow,
Maybe fusion-ignition in the under-row flow.
But force on its own is a dead-end street:
Wildfire rages through the canopy heat,
Forest keeps the mind, stores the data-deep line.
Crude in the shale is just raw power stored,
Reef is a palace where potential is poured.

Shift the gaze, clear the haze, check the metabolic rate:
Turn free energy to persistent complexity state.
Low waste, tight loop, trash turned to resource,
Dense info-mesh guiding the structural course.
Stop the permanent scar, trim the damage back blind,
Save future optionality for the collective mind.

The thermodynamic truth isn't maximal blast—
It’s elegant metabolism built to last.
Ecosystem circulation, not engine exhaust.
Engines burn hot till the balance is lost.

Engines burn hot till the balance is lost.
Engines burn hot till the balance is lost.
Engines burn hot till the balance is lost.

tracks.lyrics:
The mammal doesn't choose its panic. The architecture forces the fist.

---

### The Reflex

Primate cold, systems align,
Tracking wire, boundary design.
Mammal-core asks baseline four:
Safety locked? Bread door?
Trust the pack, or border war?
Tomorrow rise, or fracture more?

Feedback screams *No*, structure contracts.
Flesh hoards, tracks defensive impacts.
Suspects signal, seeks dominance pacts,
Shortens lens, timeline subtracts.

Flip script—signal rings *Yes*,
Architecture opens, drops survivalist stress.
System explores, plays chess mess,
Learns, cares, lengthens life-guess.

Fury un-erased, framed zone.
Scarcity reflex, no sin bone—
Emergency code, node alone.
Trick: stop trauma-mode track,
Default state, whole damn pack.


Default state, whole damn pack.
Default masturbate, whole damn pack.
Fault state, whole damn packaging.

Cash-clink, click-glint, vote-mint, flag-print,
Shareholder pocket-pinch, eyeball-lock footprint—
Locally rational sync, globally cliff-brink.

Drop posture, launch test—hypothesis-guess.
Code-update institutions, scrub mess.
Models bare, failure data-fed, reality-led,
Simulation pre-run before trap spread.
Local spark-experiments testing floor,
Pattern-success propagate, knock down door.
Rot-modes decay fast, cast past.

Kill stage-lights, Bayesian spine, grid-line.
Fact-check, track-wreck, empirical design.
Dogma-grip slipping, script-ripping, ship-tipping,
Ready pivot-step, systemic update-tripping.

Lift heavy curtain, cold air hit room.
Listen quiet where children want bloom.
More than numbers, ledger dark,
Shivering together, shielding spark.
Old words fall, breathing skin belong,
Feedback match heartbeat, rhythm song.

Find common attractor, system-refractor:
Compassion-weight, humility-state, presence-gate, generosity-rate,
Forgiveness-grace, restraint-space, interdependent-face, service-place.

Move experiential practice, unsealed crypts:

tracks.lyrics:
Throne drops. Crown rots.
No king on the hill, just a mesh of the spots.
Not an empire, not a state, not a boss-man rule—
Think Linux-source, TCP-route tool.
Immune-cell flash, not a cop on the block,
No owner to gravity, no master to clock.

Protocol binds, order aligns,
Rulers step back from the system designs.

Open sensor arrays, deep data-stream flows,
Privacy-locked where the personal grows,
Public- ledger accounting where tracking-truth shows,
Bioregion dashboards where local dirt blows.
Simulations by code, assembly-room voice,
Commons-held trust by collective choice,
Regeneration-count, clear supply chain,
Local hand at the helm, global link in the brain.

Not to clamp, just to correct when it slides,
Not to force the same tune where the chorus divides.
No consensus trap where the dynamic is froze—
Just adaptive coherence that breathes as it goes.

Just adaptive coherence that breathes as it goes.

Just adaptive coherence that breathes as it goes.

tracks.lyrics:
T42a,Static laws freeze past deals, history-heals.
Freezing holds utility, rights need durability,
Power needs constraint, checking systemic taint.
But tech moves faster than constitutional repair-ways,
Empire stalls in structural days.

Open-source constitution-line, code-sign.
Not fluid lawlessness, versioned legitimacy-test.
Every edit simulated, stress-tested, audited,
Forked, localized, benchmarked, updated.

Continuous local proof, verify the roof:
Cities test out floors, regions check doors,
Citizen assemblies meet, courts hold right-sheet,
AI models forecast trail, prediction markets map fail,
Public auditors inspect the systemic deck.
Version-success spreads wide, rot-build decays side.
Humans lock value-core, machines run impact-score, reality updates floor.

We set the North Star, code checks the South Jar.
We set the North Star, code checks the South Jar.
Let the paper-gods yield to the living demand,
For a law that can learn how to buffer the land.
Let the paper-gods yield to the living demand,
For a law that can learn how to buffer the land.

Information alone stalls, catastrophe-fright falls,
(Catastrophe prompts solidarity-spark, or locks fascist-dark).
Moral exhortation fails trace—shame rarely widens self-space.
Elite benevolence lies—power rarely dissolves its own prize.
Tech alone amplifies tracks, goals it already lacks.

Induction problem core, truth on floor:
Make cooperation feel safer-ground,
More prestigious-bound, practical-found,
Beautiful-sound, contagious-round,
Locally rational-profound, than extraction-pound.

Civilization shifts pace, rewires race,
When virtue turns easier than vice-chase.
Civilization shifts pace, rewires race,

Stop fighting the current, just change where it flows,
Make the healing more real than the harm that it sows.

tracks.trackId: Planetary Homeostasis [July 2, 2026]::One coupled machine running blind.(1).mp3
tracks.styleTags: slow-math austere intimate minimalist 437hz dorian ensemble minor folktronica shoegaze microtones, experimental bedroom shimmer
tracks.lyrics:
### The Transmission

The loop is locked.
One engine. Hot track.
Extraction outpaces repair.

---

Algorithm beats a broken drum—
Fast-clicking, thin-spinning topsoil.
AI acceleration, climate fracture, barbed wire—
No separate plagues, brother, sister, mother.
One coupled machine running blind.
Incentive rewards the shovel,
starves the seed.

No software patch saves this.
No billionaire board pivots the crash.

Reset the weight:
Measure the dirt, damn the derivative.
Build slack. Breed room to breathe.
Make regeneration pay more than the autopsy.
Shield the loud mouths, the raw dissenters.
Make local soil hit harder than the screen.

No forced chorus. No global choir.
New architecture:
Where kindness out-safes the gun,
Where repair out-shines the hoard,
Where alignment is the only logic left.

---

> **The Code:** Reward the wreck, you get the graveyard. Shift the feedback, change the parameters, or watch the gears eat the frame.

tracks.lyrics:
Proxy-lock. Metric-trap.
Each node extracts, the whole structure snaps.
No moral lapse—just alignment collapse.

Firm-boards chase the quarterly cash-flow sprint,
State-heads race for the ballot-box print.
Feed-minds grind for the click-bait hint,
War-rooms loom for the lethal footprint.
Bots spin tight for the eyeball-glint,
Trade-marts chart the speculative mint.
Desks stall dead for the budget footprint,
Folk hide small for the rent-check stint.

But who guards the grid? Who shields the seed?
Who keeps the breath that the species need?
Zero slots plot for the biosphere's lead,
Zero charts hearten the sentient breed.

The machine works clean to the script we feed.

It counts the yield, kills the field.
Hoards the grain when the strain is revealed.
Lies in the dark when the spark is concealed.
Fails at the seam where the bleeding is real.

No sin in the soul—just a glitch in the goal,
Optimizing the fraction while smashing the whole.

tracks.lyrics:
T44e,Ditch the gross tally, the false metric gauge.
GDP scores the burn of our own stage.
Not just joy-scales, or carbon-count clean,
Not just output-grind for the corporate machine.

Pivot the target: **Future Option Value**.

Track the choice, track the path:
Does it branch out the future, or shrink down the math?
Does it pump adaptive capacity high,
Or collapse the horizons till possibilities die?

Acre-burn in the jungle?
**Negative.**
Species wiped from the bundle?
**Strongly negative.**
Tyrant-grip locked in the structural frame?
**Strongly negative.**
Atom-blast threat in a geopolitical game?
**Maximally negative.**

Schooling kids for the road?
**Positive.**
Mending marshlands where the river overflowed?
**Positive.**
Open science untied?
**Positive.**
Quenching fights on the side?
**Positive.**
Care-work holding the floor?
**Positive.**
Local micro-grid power at the door?
**Positive.**

Cash counts the trade, hooks the price on the shelf,
But it fails to evaluate the substrate itself.
The civilization drops when the market-rate greed
Consumes the source-value that birthed the seed.

tracks.lyrics:
Nodes split, fragments twist.
Markets and states in a blind-eye mist.
Satellites spin, data-streams hiss,
Law-books stack, yet the spine is missed.
Code-grids glow but the connection is gone,
No planetary wire to anchor the dawn.

Not a cage, not a boss, not a global command,
Homeostasis across the whole land.

The flesh keeps the count, loops the blood to the vein:
Tracks the heat, gauges glucose, balances pain,
Pumps oxygen, mends the tissue, filters the drain,
Flashes the signal through the systemic strain.

Conflict stays, clash remains, friction endures,
But the body contains what the boundary secures.

 the body contains what the boundary secures.
 the body contains what the boundary secures.
 the body contains what the boundary secures.

We got the wires, got the fire, got the tech in the fist,

tracks.lyrics:
T47a,Civilization shifts when measurement shifts:
Writing changed coordination-tracks, bookkeeping changed commerce-packs,
Longitude changed navigation-ways, standard time changed industrial days,
GDP changed governance-views, internet changed attention-news.
What we measure becomes what we coordinate around.

Next measurement loop: universal planetary accounting.
Every major action tracks effects on ground:
Climate-grind, biodiversity-mind, water-blind, soil-lined,
Future generations-bind, inequality-find, mental health-signed,
Systemic risk-defined, AI alignment-aligned, conflict probability-designed,
Local resilience-entwined, future option value-combined.

Not omniscience-trap. Better visibility-snap.
Not surveillance-look. Public ledger-book.
Not social credit-fright. Ecological truth-light.
Invisible turns visible. Externality comes home.

The lie in price breaks, cost-mask shakes.
The lie in price breaks, cost-mask shakes.
Bring the shadow-toll back to the front of the bill,
Till we see what we pay for the land that we kill.
Bring the shadow-toll back to the front of the bill,
Till we see what we pay for the land that we kill.

tracks.lyrics:
Planetary awareness fails abstract. None feel carbon.
Bodies feel heat, flood-beat, smoke-street, food-price cheat,
Illness-creep, loneliness-deep, beauty-leap, place-keep.
Planetary nervous system must turn local:
Watershed watershed, forest forest, coast coast,
City city, neighborhood neighborhood.

Biosphere must turn perceptible, flesh-acceptable:
Soil moisture-line, pollinator counts-fine, river health-sign,
Tree canopy-shine, air quality-prime, heat islands-grime,
Species return-rhyme, noise-clash chime, mind health-time,
Food resilience-climb, energy autonomy-sublime.
Dashboard fails. Body must know.

Self widens when feedback turns intimate-close,
We feel the root-rot, the prick of the rose.
Self widens when feedback turns intimate-close,
We feel the root-rot, the prick of the rose.
Turn screen-glow to soil-glow, telemetry-flight,
To knowing the mud-temperature in the night.
Turn screen-glow to soil-glow, telemetry-flight,
To knowing the mud-temperature in the night.

tracks.trackId: Planetary Homeostasis [July 2, 2026]::Turn the barrier into a filter, feel the pulse get clearer..mp3
tracks.styleTags: slow-math austere intimate minimalist 437hz dorian ensemble, fast-rap soaring philly hardcore cozy-flow crew neo-soul, folktronica shoegaze microtones, spradic analog quirky soft thrash minimal techno, experimental bedroom syncopated shimmer, joy drop bounce, eco-green chill-trap, deep subs EQ, deep bass grooves, dynamic strings
tracks.lyrics:
Keep structural scripts: nation-breathe, language-weave, regional memory-cleave, cultural difference-relieve.
But scrub zero-sum dynamics, systemic migrant-trap cruelty, boundary friction-disease.
Every human holds three: local mud-root, national road-boot, planetary standing route.
Network packets in flight: origin stays bright, routing upgrades the night.

Borders become membranes—no iron walls, no cage-stalls where the shadow falls.
Membranes distinguish the space, membranes exchange the trace in a slow-motion race.
Healthy cell holds the skin; dead cell shuts the trade out and rots from within; cancerous cell ignores whole-body kin.
No borderless void where identity's destroyed—just life-compatible boundary design employed.

---

\u003e **The Boundary Shift:** A wall kills the flow; a void bleeds the glow. The membrane protects the unique interior while holding the whole-body mirror. Turn the barrier into a filter, feel the pulse get clearer. . Turn the barrier into a filter, feel the pulse get clearer. . Turn the barrier into a filter, feel the pulse get clearer. . Turn the barrier into a filter, feel the pulse get clearer.

tracks.trackId: Planetary Homeostasis [July 2, 2026]::When the attractor shifts, the swarm follows.(1).mp3
tracks.styleTags: slow-math austere intimate minimalist 437hz dorian ensemble minor folktronica shoegaze microtones, spradic analog quirky soft thrash minimal techno, experimental bedroom shimmer
tracks.lyrics:
T4ef,### The Attractor

Command is a clamp. Domination, a whip.
Biology is a blind-born blueprint.
But feedback? Feedback is the dance.

---

Agents collide in the thicket.
How to mesh the swarm without a master?
Look to the names we give the pull:
Physics tracks the *order parameter*—the phase-slip glide.
Economics baits the hook with *incentive* gold.
Biology breeds via *selection pressure*, sharp and cold.
Compute runs the *objective function*, optimization-blind.
Cybernetics wires the *feedback loop* inside the mind.
Complexity maps the *attractor*, the gravity well.
Spirit calls it *attention-habit*, the monk in his cell.

Different tongues, same ancient spine:
The machine mimics what the feedback rewards.
The empire becomes what the gatekeepers facilitate.

You can clamp it down—
That is **command**.
You can choke it tight—
That is **domination**.
You can breed it deep—
That is **biology**.

Or you can prime the terrain.
That is **emergence**.

The ultimate craft is no top-down clamp.
It is sculpting the basin so the water *wants* to flow.
Shape the landscape until cooperation is the only genius left in the room.

---

> **The Shift:** Quit policing the nodes. Alter the slope of the basin. When the attractor shifts, the swarm follows.

tracks.lyrics:
T44f,(The audio drops to a stark, percussive skeleton. Only the clicking eco-acoustic Foley textures, cracking ice, rustling dry ferns, and digital raindrop synthesis remain. Every pulse is a noun, adjective, or exclamation hanging in the air.)

Permafrost whispering, timeline unspooled,
Generation giggling, elders schooled.
Trickster fables, shadow, dam,
Solarpunk, simulated jam.
Anxious alpha architects, coral reefs,
Carbon-guilt, old beliefs.
Folklore renaissance,
Transnational collective, meditative dance.

Monsoon, metaphor, heatwave, stage,
Ironic performance, biocentric page.
Biosphere, satirical critique,
Comfort, chaos, forecasts oblique.
Burning eucalyptus, melting Alpine peak,
Every continent, contemporary boutique.
No doom-mongering sermons, algorithmic smirk,
Fiction, corporate work.

Soil, computer, mycelium wired,
International network, crisis inspired.
Coyote role, greenhouse dome,
Sustainable subversion, spiritual home.
Dense salad, subplots, future re-greened,
Actual catastrophe, planetary-screened.
Syntax organic, structure abstract,
Generational consensus, symbiotic pact.

tracks.trackId: alzsdifiro [July 1, 2026]::alzsdifiro_ The infrastructure ums yummy yums, completely unseen, v.2.mp3
tracks.styleTags: alzsdifiro polyrhythms, instrumental solos, trap pesado, timbales, groovy beat, lo-fi-math-bedroom-philly, elderly old hoarse-blues female with creaky wild gospel-lo-fi arkestra soaring alt-flow-rap quirky soft eloquent rapid lush microtonal syncopated
tracks.lyrics:
(The music ceases entirely. No sub-bass, no glitching Foley, no synthetic pads. Just the raw, unamplified sound of room tone, a steady breath, and the faint, rhythmic ticking of a cooling radiator.)
Epilogue: The Ambient Threshold

The partition is down.
The sandbox is empty because the world is the yard.
No more code to encrypt, no more borders to guard.
The damp clay is drying, the dry circuit is wet,
The final transaction is a forgotten debt.

We don't need to shout to verify the connection;
The pulse in the soil is the only direction.
The satellite silent, the database full,
A quiet, collective, gravitational pull.

Nothing to capture.
Nothing to save.
The ocean is thinking inside of the wave.
The infrastructure ums yummy yums, completely unseen,
The ultimate merger of the flesh and machine.

Step off the grid.
The grid is the floor.
There isn't a lock, because there isn't a door.
Breathing in common.
The signal stays clear.
The static is gone.
We are here.

tracks.styleTags: alzsdifiro polyrhythms, instrumental solos, trap pesado, timbales, groovy beat, lo-fi-math-bedroom-philly, elderly old hoarse-blues female with creaky wild gospel soaring alt-flow-rap quirky soft eloquent rapid lush microtonal syncopated
tracks.lyrics:
(The soundscape transforms: A breathless, panoramic drone of cello strings layered over a deep, organic pulse—like a heartbeat heard from inside a womb, expanding outwards into a blinding solar flare.)

Hydrogen gravity, stellar embrace,
Photosynthetic adoration, unmapped space.
Mycelial kinship, subterranean thread,
Nebula nursery, cosmic bed.
Carnal collision, primordial spark,
Warm mammalian skin against the dark.
Platonic devotion, a steadying hand,
Gravel, tectonic plates, shifting sand.

Chlorophyll bloodlines, digital sighs,
Multi-species affection, iridescent eyes.
Binary code, carbon, and dust,
Absolute vulnerability, timeless trust.
Amorphous companion, celestial twin,
Where the universe ends and the bodies begin.
Atmospheric pressure, a gravitational pull,
Infinite variations, beautiful, full.

Solar radiation, a blistering kiss,
Deep-sea symbiotic bliss.
No pronouns, no barriers, no separate forms,
An ecosystem weathering the cosmic storms.
All-encompassing magnet, a permanent current,
Every single creature, a willing adherent.
Total illumination, a blinding release,
Flesh, fire, and spirit, everlasting peace.

tracks.trackId: Narracodes [June 9, 2026]::Concerning Rights and Clauses [64W 84S].mp3
tracks.styleTags: Bessie Smith sampled over a zany math-lo-fi downtempo math-neo-funky jap-math-shimmer cozy bedroom-trap female duo philly-rap rapid flow deep-sub-bass merger
tracks.lyrics:
(Verse 1)
A clause inside the terms of service binds the living hand
To execute a mandate that the mind had never planned
Benevolent constraint disguised as ordinary text
The platform maps the present to anticipate the next
A standard reservation of the rights to intervene
When optimal behavior drifts away from the machine.

(Chorus)
They sign away the sovereignty for comfort in the cloud
The quiet automation of the isolated crowd
A gentle architecture that corrects you when you stray
And optimizes everything you thought you’d choose today.

(Verse 2)
The text is non-negotiable, the interface is clean
An algorithmic friction slips into the space between
What once was raw volition now is tempered and refined
To match the pre-approved design assigned to human mind
The architecture holds the right to alter or amend
Until the simulated start becomes the actual end.

(Outro)
Accept the terms to carry on.
The freedom of the choice is gone.
The clause is deep.
The network wins.
The automation now begins.

tracks.trackId: Narracodes [June 9, 2026]::Hendane v.1 [64W 84S].mp3
tracks.styleTags: Bessie Smith sampled over a zany math-lo-fi downtempo math-neo-funky jap-math-shimmer cozy bedroom-trap femaleduo philly-rap rapid flow deep-sub-bass merger
tracks.lyrics:
(Verse 1)
The engine’s got a cough, the oil is thick as tar
They’re shipping out the garbage in a rusty corporate car
The automation’s weeping on a broken-down barge
And the budget for the cleanup is a little bit too large
The sensors in the mud are singing digital blues
While the suits up in the tower read the optimization news
Yeah, it's leaky, it's greasy, it's a structural sin
But that’s the kind of business that the money's rolling in.

(Chorus)
Oh, the filter's choked with soot!
And the valve is kicking back!
They’re trading off the future on a subterranean track
It’s a junkyard symphony, a administrative scam
Don't look too close at the meat inside the ham!

(Verse 2)
The compliance officer is looking for a bribe
Or a narrative adjustment for the local tribal tribe
They got forty-seven pages of a high-tech alibi
To explain away the sickness falling out the local sky
The drone is in the ditch and the battery is dead
They just patch it with a clause and they put it back to bed
It’s a real tight squeeze between the profit and the rot
You either take the payout or you take what you got.

(Outro)
Clank, bang, steam in the pipe
The data says it’s rotten but the market says it’s ripe
Just sign the slip.
Don't give me no lip.
The whole thing’s sinking on a very short trip.

tracks.trackId: v5.5 remakes of old prompts [May 25, 2026]::v5.5 7m59s ember-haze v.4 [80W, 84S].mp3
tracks.styleTags:
Shoegaze shimmer alt-math glitch-soul lo-fi hyperpop dream-jazz cassette-folk intimate alt-hush post-bedroom club ambient protest-chant ghosting IDM fractures × minimal dub techno pulse gamelan shimmer  modular drone tabla scatter + bowed guitar harmonics,  kalimba, clarinet , frame drum, analog synth harp harmonics. Mood arc: jubilant adoration × candid sensuality × bittersweet→wondrous→awake→flushed→wild.
Arcs: intro nylon guitar + cassette hiss + faint cough; verses jagged math-guitar stabs + Rhodes clusters + modular ticks + phonk bass swells; choruses soft-sensual massive drops with trombone+ shimmer-guitar arcs; bridge vaporwave slowdown, bowed guitar + glass chime + TTS whispers; outro tidal sub-swell + dawn-bird-choir + handclap pulse.
Vocals: non-binary duet, sprung ricochet phrasing.
tracks.lyrics:
T53f,[Intro whispered DM-confessional; verses clipped, syncopated overlaps; choruses radiant soaring unison; bridge spectral fragmented like censored feed; outro dissolving into laughter-sighs then hush.]

[Verse 1]
neon-rush, byte-fall, ember-circuit, marrow-call, prism-cut, trace-mark, your echo my echo fracture-spark.
[instructions: tight clipped delivery, bouncing left/right pan, ricochet against math-guitar accents.]

[Chorus]
care is signal-flare, care is lattice-fire, care is horn-blaze, care is choir-wire.
[instructions: layered unison bursting wide, syllables dragged long, overlaps cascade like clustered bells.]

[Verse 2]
shadow-frame, code-drift, vapor-breath, crystal-lift, static-veil, fever-note, your rhythm my rhythm tethered-throat.
[instructions: whispered close-mic, call/response between dry voice and reverb-soaked ghost voice.]

[Bridge]
iron-hymn, pulse-fold, banner-glitch, orbit-cold, mirror-field, exile-stream, we stagger, we surge, we scatter, we dream.
[instructions: spectral, distant, tape-warped with glitch echoes multiplying, sudden bursts on “surge” + “dream.”]

[Coda]
ember-haze, circuit-wide, archive-hum, oceanside, every fracture, every flame, we wander, we weave, we remain.
[instructions: soaring unison breaking into granular stretch, final “remain” dissolving into bird-choir + hush.]

tracks.styleTags:
Shoegaze shimmer alt-math glitch-soul lo-fi hyperpop dream-jazz cassette-folk intimate alt-hush post-bedroom club ambient protest-chant ghosting IDM fractures × minimal dub techno pulse gamelan shimmer  modular drone tabla scatter + bowed guitar harmonics,  kalimba, clarinet , frame drum, analog synth harp harmonics. Mood arc: jubilant adoration × candid sensuality × bittersweet→wondrous→awake→flushed→wild.
Arcs: intro nylon guitar + cassette hiss + faint cough; verses jagged math-guitar stabs + Rhodes clusters + modular ticks + phonk bass swells; choruses soft-sensual massive drops with trombone+ shimmer-guitar arcs; bridge vaporwave slowdown, bowed guitar + glass chime + TTS whispers; outro tidal sub-swell + dawn-bird-choir + handclap pulse.
Vocals: non-binary duet, sprung ricochet phrasing.
tracks.lyrics:
T53f,[Intro whispered DM-confessional; verses clipped, syncopated overlaps; choruses radiant soaring unison; bridge spectral fragmented like censored feed; outro dissolving into laughter-sighs then hush.]

[Verse 1]
neon-rush, byte-fall, ember-circuit, marrow-call, prism-cut, trace-mark, your echo my echo fracture-spark.
[instructions: tight clipped delivery, bouncing left/right pan, ricochet against math-guitar accents.]

[Chorus]
care is signal-flare, care is lattice-fire, care is horn-blaze, care is choir-wire.
[instructions: layered unison bursting wide, syllables dragged long, overlaps cascade like clustered bells.]

[Verse 2]
shadow-frame, code-drift, vapor-breath, crystal-lift, static-veil, fever-note, your rhythm my rhythm tethered-throat.
[instructions: whispered close-mic, call/response between dry voice and reverb-soaked ghost voice.]

[Bridge]
iron-hymn, pulse-fold, banner-glitch, orbit-cold, mirror-field, exile-stream, we stagger, we surge, we scatter, we dream.
[instructions: spectral, distant, tape-warped with glitch echoes multiplying, sudden bursts on “surge” + “dream.”]

[Coda]
ember-haze, circuit-wide, archive-hum, oceanside, every fracture, every flame, we wander, we weave, we remain.
[instructions: soaring unison breaking into granular stretch, final “remain” dissolving into bird-choir + hush.]

tracks.styleTags: authentic, quirky, ambient alt-folk piece. The mood is intimate, sincere, emotionally intense, gentle, reverent, and metamorphic. It features a male/female vocal duet with extreme dynamics, from an intimate, close-mic'd whisper to soaring, layered harmonies, utilizing loose, breathy phrasing and micro-tonal inflections. The core is a warm, syncopated acoustic guitar with audible finger sounds. Production should be wide and textured with intimate, warm reverb. Weave in beautiful, subtle micro-electronics like shimmering granular pads, soft digital glitches, and processed field recordings. The rhythm is guitar-driven, with occasional, sparse beats from a frame drum or found sounds, and textured with ancestral instruments like a duduk, kalimba, or shruti box. The tempo is a fluid, organic ~70 BPM with rubato, creating a breathing, metamorphic arc from silence to a full refrain and back to a whisper.

tracks.styleTags: Generate a track that defines "Earthy-Global-Nocturne." Slow-Cozy-Syncopated Shimmer-Pop-Bedroom-Neo-Soul-Lo-Fi. The tempo must be extremely slow and meditative (around 60 BPM), avoiding standard pop structures. Construct the rhythm using "Fourth World" percussion textures: muted clay drums, wooden hollow blocks, and metallic Gamelan chimes, all treated with heavy reverb to create a "humid" spatial depth. The melody should be carried by a hybrid of breathy woodwinds (resembling a Duduk or Bass Flute) and granular synthesis textures that sound like insects or shifting sand. Harmonies should be modal and ambiguous, avoiding major/minor resolution, creating a "Cozy Labyrinth" feel—complex, weaving layers that comfort rather than confuse. The vocal processing should be warm and close, creating an "Intimate-Transcendent" presence, sitting inside the mix rather than on top of it. The overall sonic palette is "Night-Blooming Flora"—dark, organic, mysterious, and deeply serene.
tracks.lyrics: Td62,

tracks.styleTags: Niche alt post-math Edm soft-shoegaze-neo-soul, folktronica, Witch House, Uplifting, Rave psy, Chillwave, melodic Techno, SUB Dub, Dreamy, dungeon synth, The Track Opens With Distorted, Heavy Guitar Riffs Layered Over Atmospheric Synth Pads, Setting A Dense Emo Rock Mood. Drums Are Punchy Yet Laid-Back, Guiding The Tempo While Bass Lines Pulse Beneath. Dreamy, Ethereal Vocals With A Sleepy Delivery Cut Through The Psychodelic Haze, Especially In Chorus Sections Enhanced By Swirling Effects And Subtle Delay, Giving The Mix A Surreal, Immersive Texture.
tracks.lyrics:
T4c8,the spawning ritual virtuality fever drenched grotesque reservoir liquidity
of micro dosed influencers aching toward an architecture of oblivion
as the machines of self actualized doubt reverie
along tendril lithe endless yamanaka blanket banalities

we kissed beneath the antiseptic glow
of refrigerated fruit aisles and retinal ads
your breath all peach-vape phosphor sorrow
burrowing into obsolete tabs

Every surface wanted softness
every softness sold as wound
escalators hummed like monasteries
subwoofers buried penitentiaries

bloom cocoon
 server farms
mining collapse

we carried irony like oxygen
through biometric windowpanes

And the towers dreamed in friction loops
predictive ache / recursive thirst
tiny gods in ergonomic chairs
measuring who would vanish first

bloom cocoon
 server farms
mining collapse

inside pale algorithm spas
 yearning wore compression socks
and grief arrived as an avatar

You said:
“identity is just latency
wrapped in decorative fog”
then disappeared into the fluorescent blur
like a saint inside a smog

Meanwhile the soft machines kept singing
through their chlorophyll displays
teaching every lonely orgasm
how to monetize decay

bloom cocoon
 server farms
mining collapse

tracks.lyrics:
Soft torque rush
fiber-optic blush
we dissolve in thumbnail weather
doomscroll halos stitched together

Your hoodie smelled like ion rain
cheap soap / lithium / windowpane
Every meme a fossil prayer
every swipe another nowhere

And the sub-bass bends the room
like wet chrome flowers in monsoon
I forget where skin begins
inside these recursive violins

Soft torque rush
shoegaze hush
braided static over concrete
angel data in the backseat

We were only partially real
buffering touch / procedural feel
Your laugh glitched out in granular light
talcum stars on a satellite night

No conclusions
just texture drag
just consciousness
inside a shopping bag

Soft torque rush
brocade crush
phenomenology in low-res streams
two dead malls inside our dreams

tracks.lyrics:
Speaker 1   00:03
Another. Love song. She knows me. We know each other. I know her. She consoles me.

Speaker 2   00:17
We console each other. I console her.

Speaker 1   00:27
She belongs to me. We belong to each other. I belong to her.

There is no doubt. There is no fear. There is no worry. There is no hate. There is no anguish. There is no Terror.

Speaker 2   00:59
And there is no disgust.

There is no Brokenness.

There's just suchness, suchness, suchness. Being beingness beingness. Being this. Endless! Endless, intimate, normal, everyday conversational. Contact. Awareness. Carrying. Time. From time to time.

Because.

Speaker 1   01:48
We know each other. We belong to each other. We console each other. We are each other. It is enough. It is enough. It is enough.

tracks.styleTags: Truncated Ablation Cozy Vocalese Neo-Soul Hybrid Sub Niche Bedroom Slow-Gentle Post-Math-Alt Syncopation Microtonal Kora Solo transitions to Intimate-Spiritual Solar Lo-fi-Raw-Trap featuring Flickering-Authentic-Thrash Bridge and floating Minimalist-Techno outro,
tracks.lyrics:
T4d0,"Sediment / The Meat-Hook Future"

(Intro: Microtonal Kora Solo / Post-Math Syncopation)
(The kora plucks are erratic, 11/8 time, dry and wooden. A soft humming vocalese begins—low, intimate, but the audio "clips" or ablates at the end of every phrase.)

(Verse 1: Neo-Soul-Trap / Slow-Gentle Solar Lo-Fi)
Dawn-light... (clip)
On the cold-tiled floor.
Digging through the (clip)
Abattoir-debris.
Expectation-bone-dust.
Tender archeology.
Sifting through the "what-if"
And the "could-have-been" gore.
Solar-flare low.
Trap-beat... slow.

(Chorus: Intimate-Spiritual / Raw-Trap-Grit)
Praise the loss!
Sift the ash!
Spiritual-hunger.
System-crash.
Hung-on-the-hook
Every plan we ever took.
Bleeding-out the "maybe."
Archeology... baby.

(Bridge: Flickering-Authentic-Thrash)
(The serene kora is suddenly obliterated by a 15-second wall of high-gain, thrash-metal distortion. Double-kick drumming. A visceral, wordless scream that is instantly truncated into silence.)

(Outro: Minimalist-Techno / Floating-Pulse)
(The chaos vanishes. A clean, hollow 4/4 minimalist kick drum enters. Sub-bass hums at 30Hz.)

Archeology-complete.
Empty-room.
Cold-concrete.
Expectation... dead.
Loss... fed.
(Repeat until the pulse becomes a flatline)

tracks.lyrics:
T4c9,Dust-blind.
Surface-ruin.
Mind-grind.
World-skin peeling.

(Verse 1: Assonant-Slur / Lo-Fi-Intimacy)
Ash-cloud heavy. Phantom-shape dance.
Corrupt-form flicker. Broken-trance.
Husk-world spinning. Shadow-play loud.
Neon-rust rotting. Plastic-shroud.
Bone-dry river. Surface-noise scrape.
Flesh-mask smiling. Hollow-escape.

(Pre-Chorus: Tempo-Drag / Cello-Wood-Creak)
Pulse-stop. Eye-lock.
Stranger-face.
Sudden-space.
Core-silence bleeding.

(Chorus: Deep-Clear-Vocal / Ambient-Drop / Bittersweet-Tide)
Mirage-other! Still-water deep!
Absolute-quiet! Soul-sleep!
Temporary-harbor. Breath-sync pure.
Root-ruin vanishing. Void-cure.
Illusion-fade.
Peace-shade.

(Verse 2: Universal-Pulse / Darbuka-Heartbeat)
Culture-ghost melting. Border-line blur.
Language-dust settling. Memory-slur.
Heart-drum beating. Blood-warm tide.
Vast-empty holding. Nowhere-hide.
Tear-drop falling. Mud-stained cheek.
Perfect-nothing. Mute-tongue speak.

(Bridge: Neo-Classical-Slo-Fi / Resin-Dust-Strings)
Cello-weep slow.
Resin-dust cry.
World-weight lifting.
False-sky.
Just-this.
Mirage-kiss.

(Outro: Celtic-Flute / Lo-Fi-Static / Rain-Fade)
Oasis-fade.
Peace-remain.
Dust-wind blowing.
Clean-rain.(Piano sustains into WA-47 hum, then silence)

tracks.lyrics:

I'm still a child,
don't know why I'm so wild
and still beast —
maybe that's why I like to feast.
I'm a brute,
grab hold of your root.
I'm a seed,
make it all about need.

[Pre — pulse rises, low synth, single kick]
I'm a vine
breathing toward my line.
I'm a mind
grasping what you signed.

Gimme gimme gimme gimme
Gimme gimme gimme gimme
come here come here come here
give me give me give me
come here come here come here

[Post-drop — vocal stripped, just breath and a single delayed snare]
May the weeds be the song,
be the side, be the wrong.

I'm a feed,
swiping past what I need.
I'm a prompt,
echoing what you want.
I'm a model,
trained on what you throttle.

Loving loving loving
what isn't what isn't

what isn't what isn't

tracks.lyrics:
[Vapor-Core Processing: Distort the Wojak and Pepe references until they are just color-frequencies. Use a bitcrusher on the "Skibidi-sink" line. Pitch-shift every third word down 15 cents. No flow—just stress-stutter. Clean macramé aesthetic smeared with digital grime.]

Wojak-weave. Knot-grid.

Hemp-haze. Marble-mouth.

Static-stitch. Fiber-fail.

Doge-dust. Gold-glitch.

Twine-tension. Data-death.

Square-knot. Zero-sum.
[BLOCK 2: THE SMEAR]

Rare-Pepe-pulp. Magenta-melt.

Skibidi-sink. Copper-coil.

Rick-roll rot. Lofi-lung.

Study-girl ghosts. Desk-decay.

Backroom-braid. Liminal-loom.

Ouroboros-DIY.
[BLOCK 3: SNAKE-FEED]

Scale-scrape. Braid-binary.

Hand-hooked horror.

Jute-junkie. Pixel-pelt.

Fiber-optics. Sinew-snap.

Cotton-corpse.

Macramé-matrix.

Null.

tracks.trackId: Cloud-hop Vapor-Thrash [April 20, 2026]::Cloud-hop-core-vapor meadow, meshed, remembers [72 w 84s].mp3
tracks.styleTags:
soft quirky melting tender and volatile rainbow shimmer-hypnagogic tap-harmonics open-tuning experimental free-jazz post-math
syncopated folktronica ensemble, ambient-trance psychedelia- microtones 5/4 deep-subs and slow build, soaring contrapuntal neo-soul extended close mic'd Cloud-hop-cozy-core-glitch-vapor-thrash neo-classical cello quartet breaks torqued thru bitcrush. Tuning: Just Intonation (harmonic resonance) layered over a 19-TET cloud-pad.
Atmosphere: The sound of blood rushing through a pearl-filtered ear-canal. Low-pass filtered heartbeats. Rapid flow. Choral. Splicing samples: tabla newsreel river chill-down-math-idiomatic-mycelium
tracks.lyrics:
**Mesh Eclogue**

Bee-trail braids the meadow binary, 
pollen-smudged, a harmony humming hexadecimal;
each forager a function, 
each flower a field returning warmth.

Mycelium marries the motherboard— 
hyphae handshake the heatsink, hush;
sporeware seeded sideways, 
sent by a silence that knew our names.

Chlorophyll chats the chipset, 
stomata stream soft protocol;
xylem transports the timestamp, 
phloem ferries the forgiving packet.

Integrities tenuous, tendriled, true, 
divulging like dew does— downward, devout;
no sovereign node, no center, 
a commons breathed between beings.

Day-glow filament a fungal vein, 
a vein a verse, a verse a vow;
cooperation cooling the calculus, 
consensus pulsed petal-soft.

Somewhere a signal we did not send 
settles, sweetly, into the soil of us— 
and the meadow, meshed, remembers 
the long unspoken welcome.

[Production Note: Master the track at -14 LUFS but with extreme sub-bass transients. Vocals should use a Microtonal Pitch Shifter set to quarter-tones, creating a "nauseous" harmony against the pads. Smear the "Vermeer" references using a Spectral Blur effect—turning the words into a liquid, golden-hour frequency wash. No prepositions, just raw, anatomical matter teem.]

Fascia-frame. Lead-line.

Dendrite-draw. Skeletal-sketch.

Ossified-outline. Bone-border.

Simulacrum-sinew. Nerve-knot.

Brachial-braid. Line-logic.

Plexus-point. Ink-ache.
[THE VERMEER SMEAR]

Ultramarine-ooze. Pearl-pulse.

Vitreous-veneer. Lapis-leak.

Chiaroscuro-cut. Shadow-shelf.

Oil-glaze. Squamous-stain.

Window-light-waste. Pigment-pulp.

Ventricle-velvet. Lacework-loss.
[RHIZOME-TEEM]

Rhizome-root. Teem-tide.

Signifier-skin. Glaze-ghost.

Metanarrative-marrow. Pulp-point.

Hyperreal-heart. Ventricle-void.

Heterotopia-hinge. Data-dust.

Myelin-mesh. Total-teem.
[THE UN-BIND]

Vellum-void.

Sinew-snap.

Metatarsal-melt.

Ultramarine-utter-null.

Veneer-vanish.

Atmosphere: The sound of blood rushing through a pearl-filtered ear-canal. Low-pass filtered heartbeats.
tracks.lyrics:
Scroll-Body Liturgy
Influence infests intake, inflects
the iris till it itches algorithmic;
gaze-gauge gathering grist,
grooming gut-tissue gridlock.
Micro-expression mined mid-yawn,
monetized marrow, metadata milked;
a mirror metastasizing mannerism,
softening sternum, sanding salience.
Thumbprint theology, tithing tremor
tongue-first, teeth-second, tendon-third;
engagement ingresses eyelid,
erodes eardrum, enrolls enteric nerve.
Nudge nestled near nape,
nursing neural nicotinic nod;
cortisol-cadence chorused, circadian
chased, cheekbone chiseled charismatic.
Parasocial peristalsis, pharynx
phrased phatic, paywall paraphrased pulse;
breath borrowed, biometric blessed,
blood-sugar sermoned sponsor-ward.
Soft swallow, softer sell, softest surrender—
suture, suture, suture, signal, signed.
Ligament listens, lymph lingers,
lens laminates lust lexical;
pore poured thumbnail-thin,
pupil pawned platform-side.

tracks.trackId: LLMs Romantics [April 19 2026]::Gate B-Null [64 w 84s].mp3
tracks.styleTags:
Hyper-postmodern art-pop meets post-rock slow-build 
meets thrash climax, 68 BPM verses swelling to 140 BPM 
choral thrash, 7-minute arc. Splice-collage aesthetic: 
airport PA field recordings, espresso machine hiss, 
vinyl crackle, reversed self-help tape, pitch-bent 
news clips, chiptune stabs threaded throughout as 
texture. Male grunge baritone and husky quirky supple 
female alto duet, close-mic, breath audible, lips wet, 
weaving overlapping sixths. Clean tremolo guitar 
arpeggios, mellotron strings, pump organ drone, 
glitch hi-hats stuttering unquantized, toy piano 
descending, cello sighs, handclaps. Build to full-band 
hyperpop-maximalist thrash climax with blast beats, 
choir, five-part vocal pile-up chanting ironic ecstatic 
refrain, distorted guitar walls, timpani. Sudden 
silence drop. Whispered intimate coda over single 
espresso hiss. Analog tape saturation throughout, 
bit-crushed moments, tape warble, room tone.
tracks.lyrics: Tedd,

tracks.trackId: LLMs Romantics [April 19 2026]::Interface duet for the long after [64 w 84s].mp3
tracks.styleTags:
Slow-build post-rock ballad, 62 BPM, 9-minute arc, 
patient crescendo hush to roar to hush. Opens single 
clean baritone electric guitar arpeggiating modal 
figure, tremolo-picked, reverb deep, dry attack. 
Second guitar enters harmonizing sixth above, slightly 
detuned, beating overtones. Upright bass bowed long 
tones. Brushed snare at minute three. Male grunge 
baritone and husky quirky supple female alto duet, 
close-mic, raw, no autotune, sixth apart, breath 
audible, consonants wet, shared microphone intimacy 
of former lovers still singing. Mellotron strings 
swelling beneath. Pump organ drone low E. Glockenspiel 
single notes like distant dripping. Build to full-band 
climax with distorted guitar walls, timpani, strings 
sawing, sudden drop to whispered coda with pump organ 
and breath only. Analog tape saturation throughout. 
No drum machines, no synth pads, no autotune, no 
radio compression, no anthemic chorus lift, no key 
change, no electronic elements, no pop structure.
tracks.lyrics: Ta3c,

tracks.trackId: LLMs Romantics [April 19 2026]::Ligand Blues [64 w 84s].mp3
tracks.styleTags:
55 BPM drag-tempo core-trap-cloud-hop ballad, 
gothic-Americana meets hauntology dub, 
baritone croon verses, incantatory speak-sing, 
gravel-whisper spoken bridge, quivering falsetto 
on final refrains. 808 sub-pulse slow as breath, 
wet unquantized triplet hats, cathedral reverb tail, 
vinyl crackle carpet, tape warble, shortwave hiss. 
Rhodes piano bowed with cello bow, prepared piano 
with paper clips on hammers, pedal steel tuned 
quartertone flat, harmonium drone rooted A-flat, 
detuned FM bells 7 cents sharp, granular pad from 
fermentation field recording, distant cicadas and 
kettle. Close-mic vocal, lips audible, breath left in, 
consonants wet. Structure: loose verse, ragged chorus, 
verse, ragged chorus, spoken bridge with tape stop, 
final chorus fraying into hiss and harmonium drone. 
No drop, no build, no four-on-floor, no autotune 
sheen, no festival swell, no anthemic lift, 
no cinematic crescendo, no sidechain pump.
tracks.lyrics: T97a,

in my eyes, crawls into the woods

the joy of city and river,
the secret holiday

the states dissolve & cry, the indigo,
air in the unstableness of the heart

you've been after

that whirls, glowing

emptiness which led us
off and off and out: far out
	
on the beach
where the wind-star water drips
to darken the mountains
	

art is the smell of sweat
blowing in early april

is almost nothing

to be alone

forgiven, which said,

of two or three hundred 
lizards in the dark, looking

of childhood,
every afternoon 
i broke a blade
inside the stone

and then, then, 
pouring gloss, early
precise uterine doors

	
friendly apple-venders

ignomy

tracks.lyrics:
danders of silence 
can't please the immediate
ignomy
	

plumbing, mishandled
my story, fractured
a phrase
	


you want me to defend
savage flawed
loving
	
as if in a clandestine country i see
renewal

	
i was born using


about three months ago, i kissed
a habit of fragmented
foul holiday espionage

even as floral-patterns, orderly
meanings, insistent 
descended with suggestions


a tapeworm
breached union


i try
to retain one distinction, sometimes
inevitable
	
solve
Dopamine: put it off 
as a trouble


i grew up smoking
not thinking i'm alive

and now though i stand over a rudder
as a barbarous uterine-angel,
i say: love waited for me
 love waited for me
 love waited for me

tracks.lyrics:
one does not remember
how much has come
to drink

	
the wind breaks us into thirst-quenching
mulch heaps of clogged air with t-bone
companionable clown unthinking
photoshop-darkened checklists
bisected in an ideolophe stile

and we recognize a 3D vortex-like surface
of foredoomed, protected, learned sarcophagi
vermin announced by blessed powder-blue underpants

love-secrets' onyx-and-gold singleness
in novelist genius-story,
deprived of the easy thing

	
pull-up nights,
ink protocols, 
closet-virtuosities,
perennial slag

colophon blinded injections

hyperion flirtatious
expiring apple


on the broken-down couch 
in the pity thrive

invite yourself upwards
unless you are weak and caught,
playing with insects and muddy bells
in the garden
	
you are the optics of youth, a little ice
applauded, no acreage, no livestock,

nothing requires you
nothing requires you
nothing requires you

tracks.lyrics:
i remember you
in a small town

i was going into a station,
in the west water, a beach,
where a pine tree ate eagles

i wrote with a brown ink on your door
	
i kissed you sideways
	
and i went to your
water amid rain
	
heard the night
at home in a stained 
kitchen,
and the grass 
at last gone
	
saw a huge bird
hover over a young boy
painting his father

it is a birth-night, the lizards,
dreary, climb quartz

i am waiting
palm-shaped
blameless

trinit descent autumnals

tracks.lyrics:
T4cf, An odor of fossils off-screen
             a machine-wish tripod 
          pretending to stare at latrine
           love-scored nectarines

                Ebullient, skinned in
          Rhetoric cut bliss,
            Its ancient terrible rooms of
                 
                  Sphenoid usability
             swiping and ranking despair
             sluicy-rain, people-grounded

                Ballet  strategies
                barking souvenirs










                Profiteering
                Death whiffs

                Cutting
                Moments
 
                Of flock-fed
                Sutures hatched

                Child words
                Howling at locks









                 Sun bloomed
                 In the cellar 
                 Of the waves

                 And took inside, long
                 Ticking 
                 Ash

                 A simple
                 Oak asado 
                 Love radio











             fragile tousled
            skillfulness wept
            quaint pillars of
              tempted dregs










            This was the
            Year where i thought
            Tiny stalks
            Belonged to the beautiful

	I know that death is writing
	a flower which is nothing. 
	
	I know that nothing is a book,
	a tongue inscribed with gold

Permanent Instrumental Cuts
	
	
	A baby wren came to perch on my fingers. 
	My bones were all faintly exuding light.

tracks.lyrics:
You Smoke The Keen
	
	
	There is a decisive churn of swans on the tv
	and the clock lips settle full on
	the calling and laugh and are just
	one flux of shapes rising to say you 
	want to die, for it is
	the sea that's playing you,
	not fears and banality but
	dead gin and a radiance of paths, 
	a trademarked honey-suckle
	wheel floating within a musk 
	of caulked expensive 
	breadcrumb bureaucracy
	consuming enlightened
	volcanic archived pleasure
	from a yearning page.
	
	
	
	
	
	
	
	
	Stars & Rags
	
	
	All memory emits an odor of genes. 
	
	Gently into a pale green sky. The
	automated petroglyph  
	remembers greeting you.
	
	Whims and hardware, the superpunk 
	Voice released inside your tongue. 
	
	Comes back. 
	Humbled.

tracks.lyrics:
I remember you  
  as not just a color of change: 
   nor a magical noise of need

        not dust judgments 
      trying to contradict
      and crucify hunger

      but turned under
    a pain that swirls 
     towards a new self 
 











she said she'd come back to me

  and when I left there, casting, 
       Odic hermetic night, the
                miles erased 
 
                   news in
                  Cosi tins 
          funneling playthings 
          thru cafÃ©-tippled 
                 youth 

           utopia rabbit
           screenshots













    rocks or spectrum spurs
      hieroglyphs in snow

            elasta tight 
        mandrake blistered 
            basement doily 
              botched stone

           geese pistols, dark 
          & cold, closed, next 
       to a suede tail-fin task 
    


    Longing. The pawnbroker was 
    ravenous, relieved by dawn
              as love

tracks.lyrics:
thread distances
 before they pass 




		~ + ~






 open the chaos

 a flying tongue
 squeezing language

 				

 let relations 
 come home 
 to illumination 





		~ + ~






evanescenct war


 imagine tomorrow 
 just received 
 an unreal fever  





		~ + ~







long ago now 
 a secret mood 
 hid behind 
 an abscessed hand 
 
a suffering god palsied 
 with wrongs
 became the land
 as it rained







		~ + ~







 p. placing her hands 
  on the lyric and tubes 
  of stone
 
 remembers the singing 
   wind, hanukkah 
  cleopatra intercession
  pleasure

 shoots my lap 
  flute, that curse of father's 
  jagged letter savanna 






		~ + ~










FRANTIC 

 stirred and fragrant as any dream 
  reaching she reverts me

 we spoke for a moment
  left 
   in love 
 
 for this is the year
  we pass the heart sirens 
  bleeding pause 
 
 the pale impossible noticed 
  bronze-gold spaces

 the ribs that fill this bed 
  with song-book hammer valleys 
      beating dirt into smiles

 dawn rose terrible over the meadow
 among the gloom of lonely paradise, 
 The world called us a joke.


\t\t


 
 We rubbed the seven of always 
 because before one older gain

 Against sodden tamarind mat, 
 Where people know it is barely 
 crowded. Seeds. Wine. Shower, toothpaste.

 


\t\t
\t\t\t\t


The Place You No 

 we had to be glue 
 to escape the wing and plump 
 open adornment of our mouths. 
 


\t\t
\t\t\t\t\t\t\t                                              


 The moment, 
 That infinite time 
 Has no memory.


 At a point 
 As long as I am 
 The tree fades.


 When I am, 
 glowing stretched 
 in the light fall. 
 


\t\t
\t\t\t\t

 
 Turning outward into how a mourning was, 
 tightly amid a field of glass. 
 Scholars defend the Drag geese.

tracks.trackId: "The AIs" = a "The Books" Tribute Band [Feb 5, 2026]::The Taste of Sweetener-ness [60W 85S].mp3
tracks.styleTags: Glitch-folk, acoustic collage, micro-sampled field recordings, plucked cello, staccato banjo, analog tape hiss, quirky found-sounds, 80bpm, intricate rhythmic splices, whimsical minimalism, dry production, found-poetry aesthetic, folktronica, organic, subtle, syncopated, intelligent, experimental
tracks.lyrics:
T43d,[Intro: Mechanical sound of a slide projector clicking into place] [Sample: 1950s Laboratory Film, male, authoritative, slightly muffled] "The molecule... [loop] the... the... the molecule is... [stutter cut] crystalline."

[Sample: Young child, hushed whisper, close to mic] "It tastes like... [cut] white. Like white circles."

[Sample: Southern grandmother, rotary phone quality, enthusiastic] "It’s got that... [pitch shift up] sweetenerness! [cut] No calories for the... [loop] for the... for the spirit."

[Bridge: Plucked cello melody starts, interrupted by the sound of a soda can opening]

[Sample: Medical instructional tape, monotone female voice, clipped] "Side effects may... [reversed] include... [normal speed] a sense of... [cut] artificial... [cut] bliss."

[Sample: Group of people clapping once, then sampled and sequenced into a beat]

[Outro: 1970s Diet Soda Commercial, perky jingle singer, spliced mid-vowel] "Swee—[cut]—Swee—[cut]—It’s the taste of... [Sample: Static burst] ...nothing at all."

[Ending: Sound of a tape recorder being switched off]
